prompt: We're spending $40k/month on Google Ads for a B2B SaaS product with a 90-day sales cycle. ROAS has dropped 30% over the last quarter. Diagnose the likely causes and propose a specific remediation plan.
_note: High-traffic agent, first coverage task. Requires domain-specific Google Ads terminology (attribution windows, match types, quality scores, conversion paths) to score well on domain_signal.
